scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); require('child_process').spawn('npm', ['run','dev'], { cwd: './backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); require('child_process').spawn('npm', ['start'], { cwd: './frontend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
